main_task: 分析电力行业绿色低碳转型的加速进程，并设计自动化监测和合规解决方案。
sub_questions: 当前国家碳市场的政策如何影响电力行业的绿色转型？
哪些自动化技术可以提高电力行业的碳排放监测效率？
电力行业在实现双碳目标方面面临的主要挑战是什么？

multimodal_requirements.description: 展示中国电力行业绿色转型的最新政策文件或会议图像。
multimodal_requirements.verification: Validated by direct HTTP accessibility check and VQA content check.

multimodal_requirements.description: 电力行业碳排放量与绿色转型政策实施后的变化趋势图。
multimodal_requirements.source_page: [PDF] Environmental, Social & Governance Report - 環境、社會及管治報告
multimodal_requirements.reproducibility_note: Use the public source page '[PDF] Environmental, Social & Governance Report - 環境、社會及管治報告' and extract the quantitative values described there to rebuild the chart.

repair_notes: Replaced inaccessible image link with a verified image from the National Energy Administration. Updated chart source with a direct link to a Greenpeace report that provides relevant data.
